query: I cannot log into my account.
final_response: It seems you're having trouble logging into your account. Please try using the 'Forgot Password' option. If the issue continues, contact support for further assistance.

approved_fragments.fragment: It seems you're having trouble logging into your account. Please try using the 'Forgot Password' option. If the issue continues, contact support for further assistance.

rejected_fragments.fragment: I'm sorry to hear you're having trouble logging into your account. Please try using the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page to reset your password. If you still encounter issues after trying this, please let us know, and we'll be happy to assist further.
For accurate information, please refer to our Help Center or contact support.
We appreciate your patience and are happy to help you with this.
